name: Builda Grilla Drilla
description: Builda Grilla Drilla is a construction counterpart of Grilla Drilla in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available on May 2014.
biography: Builda Grilla Drilla is a construction counterpart of Grilla Drilla in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available on May 2014.
quote: Builda Grilla Drilla has come to fortify Skylands!
personality: Builda Grilla Drilla is the construction-themed counterpart of Grilla Drilla.

story.content: Builda Grilla Drilla is a construction counterpart of Grilla Drilla in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was available on May 2014.

content: Builda Grilla Drilla has come to fortify Skylands!

trivia: Builda Grilla Drilla is the first Alter Ego of a non-core Skylander to be available in the Wishing Well.
He is voiced by Chris Fries.
gameplay: Builda Grilla Drilla is an Alter Ego of Grilla Drilla specifically available in the mobile game Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was first released in May 2014 and can be obtained via the Wishing Well.
